creator: freebsd@marino.st
text:
Going to master site results in this message:
DNS service for this domain has expired with DNS Made Easy

Log:

=> Attempting to fetch http://mambo-code.org/gf/download/frsrelease/388/790/MamboV4.6.5.tar.gz
fetch: http://mambo-code.org/gf/download/frsrelease/388/790/MamboV4.6.5.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: http://mambo-code.org/gf/download/frsrelease/388/790/MamboV4.6.5.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
MamboV4.6.5.tar.gz                                      -1  B   16 MBps
===> Fetching all distfiles required by mambo-4.6.5 for building
===>   mambo-4.6.5 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by mambo-4.6.5 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for MamboV4.6.5.tar.gz.
===>  Giving up on fetching files: MamboV4.6.5.tar.gz 
Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/dports/www/mambo/distinfo)
are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
*** Error code 1

Fix: 

This port needs a backup site.  It's not the first time there's been trouble with the master site.
